description: Create an animated GeoGebra construction demonstrating a cycloid—the curve traced by a point on the rim of a rolling circle. The construction must include a numeric slider 't' ranging from 0 to 12.5, a circle of radius 1 with its center at (t, 1), and a point on the rim at (t - sin(t), 1 - cos(t)) that traces the cycloid. Include the full cycloid path for the range 0 ≤ t ≤ 4π and a text annotation labeling the curve. Save the project as 'cycloid_animation.ggb' in ~/Documents/GeoGebra/projects/.
